title: Navigating Module 5: Suggested Learning Resources
description: A visual guide to the recommended resources for learning about Data Structures, categorizing them by type and suggesting an effective order of study.
elements: Official Course Materials (e.g., lecture slides, notes)
relationships: Start with Official Course Materials, then proceed to either Textbook or Video Lectures for deeper understanding, use Interactive Tutorials for hands-on clarification, and finally apply knowledge on Practice Coding Platforms
